metadata.filed_by: Mr. Rajesh Kumar, Security Guard, Gurgaon Central Mall

content: I, Rajesh Kumar, Security Guard, Gurgaon Central Mall, hereby file this First Information Report regarding a hit-and-run incident that occurred on 17.03.2024 at approximately 18:58 hours near the pedestrian crossing adjacent to the mall’s main entrance. At around 18:55 hours, I was on patrol near the pedestrian zone when I heard a loud thud followed by screeching tires. I rushed to the scene and found the body of an elderly male, approximately 55-60 years old, lying on the zebra crossing with severe trauma to the head and limbs. There was no vehicle present. Nearby, I observed a shattered left headlight casing and a fragment of blue paint on the road. I immediately alerted the mall’s CCTV control room and called emergency services. The victim was identified later as Mr. Arjun Mehta, 58, resident of Sector 44. Based on CCTV footage from the east gate, a blue Mahindra XUV700 with partially obscured license plate was seen speeding away from the scene. No one stopped to assist. I request immediate investigation under Section 304A IPC and Section 134 of the Motor Vehicles Act. I have attached the CCTV timestamped footage and my signed statement.
